title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems
authors: Amrinder Mehta, Hitesh Vasudev, Jashanpreet Singh, Gurbhej Singh
abstract: Energy systems based on electrochemically active materials frequently suffer from poor performance and limited lifetimes due to interfacial problems that can be mitigated by micro- to nanoscale structuring with thermal spray coatings (TSC). This review synthesizes existing knowledge and develops a process-structure-property framework that uniquely links TSC process parameters to the coating microstructure and interfacial chemistry across different electrochemical systems, with a focus on innovative cross-system design principles. This review covers various TSC technologies (atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray) with reference to their ability to control porosity and phase distribution. These process parameters affect ion or electron conduction, interfacial resistance, and mechanical stability. The issues of transport limitations caused by porosity, inter-splat bonding, and non-equilibrium phase transformations were studied. Functionally graded interfaces, adaptive coating systems, and machine learning-based process development are innovative approaches investi­gated to achieve defect-tolerant functional interfaces. This study offers guidelines for designing next-generation TSC that are more durable, scalable, and exhibit better electro­chemical properties, thereby improving the performance and lifespan of electrochemical energy systems. The battery, proton exchange membrane, alkaline fuel cells and solid oxide fuel cell/solid oxide electrolysis cell systems were analysed with respect to one another to establish general process-structure-property relationships for electrochemical interfaces.
venue: Journal of Electrochemical Science and Engineering

infographic.key_insight: Thermal spray coatings can be engineered from the process level up to create micro/nanostructured electrochemical interfaces that reduce interfacial resistance and improve durability across batteries, fuel cells, and electrolyzers.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The review provides cross-system design rules for using thermal spray process control to tune porosity, phase distribution, and bonding for longer-lasting, more scalable energy-device coatings.
method: Compared major thermal spray routes: atmospheric plasma spray, suspension plasma spray, high-velocity oxy-fuel, and cold spray.
Mapped process parameters to coating microstructure and interfacial chemistry using a process-structure-property framework.
Highlighted advanced strategies such as functionally graded interfaces, adaptive coating systems, and machine learning-guided development.
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper synthesizes prior studies across batteries, PEM and alkaline fuel cells, and SOFC/SOEC systems to evaluate how process-induced microstructure affects transport, resistance, and stability.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains may be limited by porosity, weak inter-splat bonding, and non-equilibrium phase changes that are difficult to control consistently at scale.
infographic.paper_title: Thermal spray coatings in batteries, electrolyzers and solid oxide electrochemical systems

zh-Hans.title: 电池、电解槽与固体氧化物电化学系统中的热喷涂涂层
zh-Hans.abstract: 基于电化学活性材料的能源系统常常由于界面问题而表现出较差的性能和有限的寿命；这些问题可通过热喷涂涂层（TSC）进行微米至纳米尺度结构化来缓解。本综述综合了现有知识，并提出了一个工艺-结构-性能框架，独特地将TSC工艺参数与不同电化学系统中的涂层微观结构和界面化学联系起来，重点关注跨系统的创新设计原则。本综述涵盖了多种TSC技术（大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速火焰喷涂和冷喷涂），并参考其对孔隙率和相分布的控制能力。这些工艺参数会影响离子或电子传导、界面电阻和机械稳定性。研究了由孔隙率、飞溅层之间结合以及非平衡相变所导致的传输限制问题。功能梯度界面、自适应涂层系统以及基于机器学习的工艺开发是为实现缺陷容忍功能界面而研究的创新方法。本研究为设计下一代TSC提供了指导，这些涂层将更加耐久、可扩展，并表现出更好的电化学性能，从而提升电化学能源系统的性能和寿命。本文还将电池、质子交换膜、碱性燃料电池以及固体氧化物燃料电池/固体氧化物电解池系统相互进行分析，以建立电化学界面的一般工艺-结构-性能关系。

infographic.key_insight: 热喷涂涂层可从工艺层面进行设计，构建具有微/纳米结构的电化学界面，从而降低界面电阻并提升电池、燃料电池和电解槽中的耐久性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本综述为利用热喷涂工艺控制孔隙率、相分布和结合状态提供了跨系统设计准则，以实现寿命更长、可扩展性更好的能源器件涂层。
method: 比较了主要热喷涂路线：大气等离子喷涂、悬浮液等离子喷涂、高速火焰喷涂和冷喷涂。
采用工艺-结构-性能框架，将工艺参数映射到涂层微观结构和界面化学。
强调了功能梯度界面、自适应涂层系统以及机器学习引导的开发等先进策略。
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文综合了电池、PEM和碱性燃料电池以及SOFC/SOEC系统中的既有研究，以评估工艺诱导的微观结构如何影响传输、电阻和稳定性。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升可能会受到孔隙率、飞溅层间结合较弱以及难以在规模化条件下稳定控制的非平衡相变的限制。

title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings
authors: Rakesh Roshan, Akash Mishra, Arka Ghosh, Smruti Rekha Swain, Parth Patel, Pankaj Shrivastava
abstract: Abstract Thermally sprayed coatings are extensively used in aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial applications because of their superior wear, corrosion, and high-temperature resistance. However, the reliable evaluation of coating adhesion and cohesive integrity remains a major challenge due to the complex lamellar microstructure, residual stresses, porosity, and heterogeneous failure behaviour inherent to thermal spray processes. Among the available characterization techniques, the scratch test has emerged as a rapid, versatile, and sensitive approach for assessing coating integrity and tribological performance. Despite its widespread use, the interpretation of scratch test results for thermally sprayed coatings is still fragmented, with significant variations in testing methodologies, failure criteria, and critical load determination techniques. This review critically analyses the scratch test specifically for thermally sprayed coatings by systematically correlating scratch response with coating microstructure, process parameters, residual stress, porosity, and failure mechanisms. The work comprehensively discusses the evolution of scratch testing, different scratching methodologies, operational parameters, and advanced critical load evaluation techniques such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission analysis, and multi-axis force measurements. Furthermore, the study consolidates and compares the findings of a wide range of coating systems processed through APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related thermal spray techniques. The novelty of this work lies in providing an integrated and application-oriented perspective that bridges the gap between fundamental scratch mechanics and practical coating performance evaluation. Unlike previous studies that focus on isolated coating systems or individual testing approaches, this review establishes a unified understanding of how coating architecture and processing conditions govern scratch-induced damage and failure evolution. In addition, the manuscript identifies current limitations, inconsistencies in interpretation, and the need for standardization in scratch testing methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings. The present work, therefore serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and industrial practitioners working toward the design, optimization, and reliable performance assessment of advanced thermal spray coatings.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: Scratch testing is a fast way to assess adhesion and cohesive damage in thermally sprayed coatings, but its results are only meaningful when interpreted with coating microstructure, residual stress, and failure mode in mind.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The review helps engineers choose and standardize scratch-test parameters and critical-load criteria for qualifying thermal spray coatings used in high-wear, high-temperature, and corrosion-critical applications.
method: Reviews scratch-test methodologies and operational parameters
Correlates scratch response with microstructure, porosity, residual stress, and process route
Compares critical-load evaluation using microscopy, acoustic emission, and force sensing
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract synthesizes findings across multiple thermal spray systems and processes, including APS, HVOF, HVAF, and D-gun, to compare scratch-induced damage and failure evolution.
infographic.watch_item: Scratch-test interpretation remains inconsistent across studies, so critical loads and failure criteria should not be transferred between coatings or setups without careful calibration.
infographic.paper_title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂涂层划痕试验的批判性分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热喷涂涂层因其优异的耐磨、耐腐蚀和耐高温性能，广泛应用于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业领域。然而，由于热喷涂过程固有的复杂层片状微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率以及非均一的失效行为，对涂层结合强度和内聚完整性的可靠评价仍然是一项重大挑战。在现有表征技术中，划痕试验已成为一种快速、灵活且灵敏的方法，用于评估涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。尽管应用广泛，但针对热喷涂涂层的划痕试验结果解释仍较为分散，在测试方法、失效判据和临界载荷确定技术方面存在显著差异。本综述专门针对热喷涂涂层，对划痕试验进行批判性分析，系统关联划痕响应与涂层微观结构、工艺参数、残余应力、孔隙率及失效机制。本文全面讨论了划痕测试的发展演变、不同划痕方法、操作参数，以及先进的临界载荷评估技术，如光学显微镜、声发射分析和多轴力测量。此外，本文汇总并比较了通过 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关热喷涂技术制备的多种涂层体系的研究结果。本文的创新之处在于提供了一个集成化、面向应用的视角，弥合基础划痕力学与实际涂层性能评价之间的差距。不同于以往聚焦于单一涂层体系或单一测试方法的研究，本综述建立了一个统一认识，即涂层结构与加工条件如何支配划痕诱导损伤和失效演化。此外，本文还指出了当前的局限性、解释中的不一致性，以及热喷涂涂层划痕测试方法标准化的必要性。因此，本文可作为从事先进热喷涂涂层设计、优化及可靠性能评估的研究人员和工业实践者的重要综合参考。

infographic.key_insight: 划痕测试是评估热喷涂涂层结合强度和内聚损伤的一种快速方法，但只有结合涂层微观结构、残余应力和失效模式进行解读，其结果才具有意义。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本综述帮助工程师选择并标准化划痕测试参数和临界载荷判据，以用于高磨损、高温和腐蚀关键应用中的热喷涂涂层合格性评价。
method: 综述划痕测试方法和操作参数
将划痕响应与微观结构、孔隙率、残余应力和工艺路线相关联
比较利用显微镜、声发射和力传感进行的临界载荷评估
infographic.evidence_signal: 该摘要综合了 APS、HVOF、HVAF 和 D-gun 等多种热喷涂体系与工艺的研究结果，以比较划痕诱导损伤和失效演化。
infographic.watch_item: 不同研究之间对划痕测试的解释仍不一致，因此临界载荷和失效判据不应在未经仔细校准的情况下直接用于不同涂层或不同试验设置。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 can classify pipeline weld defects from noisy RGB images with very high accuracy while remaining lightweight enough for on-device inspection.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This supports faster, lower-power, and more scalable weld quality inspection for pipelines, especially in field conditions where manual review is slow and inconsistent.
method: Preprocess weld images and apply data augmentation to improve robustness.
Train and compare MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class defect classification.
Evaluate performance on two real-world datasets collected with HDR cameras and mobile phones.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model achieved 99.99% accuracy on the 4,927-image AI5083 dataset and improved results on the smaller PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: The very small PWDID dataset and noisy acquisition conditions may limit generalization, so deployment should be validated on more diverse field data.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：针对噪声 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊缝缺陷检测在管道检测中发挥着核心作用，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全性。传统人工检测方法存在若干局限，包括人力需求高、判断主观以及结果不一致，这些问题限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3 的应用，考虑其 Small 和 Large 两种配置，用于管道焊缝缺陷的自动多类别分类。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，以从焊缝图像中提取具有判别性的视觉特征。实验验证基于两个在实际检测条件下采集的数据集进行。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境下使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有较强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了更优结果。与先前报道的方法相比，所提出的方法的准确率提升约 3%，表明其在不同采集条件下具有鲁棒性。除高准确率外，MobileNetV3 还具有推理速度快、内存占用低以及功耗较低的优点。由于这些特性以及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适用于移动端和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在实际的端侧管道焊缝缺陷检测系统中使用 MobileNetV3 和其他现代轻量级架构，并配合去噪功能。

infographic.key_insight: MobileNetV3 可以从噪声 RGB 图像中以极高准确率分类管道焊缝缺陷，同时保持足够轻量，适用于端侧检测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这支持更快速、低功耗且更具可扩展性的管道焊缝质量检测，尤其适用于人工复核缓慢且结果不一致的现场条件。
method: 对焊缝图像进行预处理并应用数据增强，以提高鲁棒性。
训练并比较 MobileNetV3 Small 和 Large 在多类别缺陷分类中的表现。
在使用 HDR 相机和手机采集的两个真实世界数据集上评估性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型在包含 4,927 张图像的 AI5083 数据集上达到了 99.99% 的准确率，并在较小的 PWDID 数据集上取得了更优结果，相比先前方法提升约 3%。
infographic.watch_item: PWDID 数据集非常小且采集条件噪声较大，可能限制泛化能力，因此在部署前应使用更多样化的现场数据进行验证。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning plus hybrid Cross-Entropy–Lovász loss upgrade to BiSeNetV2 substantially improves seam segmentation robustness under strong reflections without adding model complexity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more reliable real-time perception for autonomous construction welding robots on shiny metallic surfaces, where missed seams can directly reduce weld quality and automation reliability.
method: Transfer-learn a BiSeNetV2 seam-segmentation backbone for welding scenes
Optimize with a hybrid Cross-Entropy + Lovász loss to stabilize learning and improve overlap quality
Compare against OHEM-based baseline and other architectures (DeepLabV3+, UNet, SegFormer) under reflective conditions
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline while keeping FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed unchanged.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are reported for reflective construction-welding data, so generalization to other seam types, camera setups, or non-reflective industrial environments still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强用于施工自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：应对双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 在施工场景中的自主机器人焊接中，可靠的焊缝分割至关重要，而恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出了一种抗反射的焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合 Cross-Entropy--Lovász 损失增强 BiSeNetV2 主干网络。该框架不增加架构复杂度，而是通过面向学习稳定性的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度保持完全一致的情况下，相比基于 OHEM 的基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点。所提出的方法还恢复了反射条件下 96.33% 的严重 zero-IoU 失败案例。对 BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet 和 SegFormer 的对比实验进一步表明，该优化策略对于轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些结果表明，所提出的框架为涉及反光金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量化的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 通过迁移学习并引入混合 Cross-Entropy–Lovász 损失对 BiSeNetV2 进行升级，可在不增加模型复杂度的情况下显著提升强反射条件下的焊缝分割鲁棒性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得自主施工焊接机器人在光亮金属表面上能够获得更可靠的实时感知，因为漏检焊缝会直接降低焊接质量和自动化可靠性。
method: 针对焊接场景对 BiSeNetV2 焊缝分割主干进行迁移学习
采用混合 Cross-Entropy + Lovász 损失进行优化，以稳定学习并提升重叠质量
在反射条件下与基于 OHEM 的基线及其他架构（DeepLabV3+、UNet、SegFormer）进行比较
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提出的方法达到 81.76% 的 Joint IoU 和 90.73% 的 mIoU，在 FLOPs、参数量和推理速度保持不变的情况下，相比 OHEM 基线将 Joint IoU 提高了 22.36 个百分点。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升报告基于具有反射特性的施工焊接数据，因此其在其他焊缝类型、相机设置或非反射工业环境中的泛化能力仍需验证。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: HVAF spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and functional shape-memory behavior, provided the coatings are annealed after deposition.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables durable, adherent NiTi functional coatings on steel for applications needing wear resistance plus thermal actuation or self-adaptive behavior.
method: HVAF-sprayed NiTi onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets
Measured composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation, and thermomechanical response
Compared as-sprayed versus annealed coatings in bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were 100–300 µm thick, adhered well to the substrate, and showed martensitic transformation plus shape-memory/thermal actuation in mechanical tests.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings were highly defective and chemically inhomogeneous, so post-spray annealing is necessary and tensile strength remains limited.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: HVAF喷涂NiTi涂层：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、摩擦和热防护方面的性能，已是一种标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层还因其独特的功能性热机械性能而具有额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直较为困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最常用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学不均匀且不发生马氏体转变的涂层，而冷喷NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合不良的问题。本文报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），其不仅表现出功能性热机械性能，而且与基体具有非常良好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上使用四组不同工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学组成、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械性能进行了评估。尽管这些涂层包含不均匀显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械载荷作用下仍会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要退火后才能表现出功能性热机械性能。尽管其抗拉强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动效应，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: HVAF喷涂可制备厚NiTi涂层；在喷涂后进行退火的前提下，这些涂层能够保持马氏体转变和功能性形状记忆行为。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得在钢基体上获得耐久、附着性良好的NiTi功能涂层成为可能，适用于既需要耐磨性又需要热致驱动或自适应行为的场合。
method: 采用HVAF将NiTi喷涂到低碳钢上，并使用四组工艺参数
测量成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变和热机械响应
在弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验中比较喷涂态与退火态涂层
infographic.evidence_signal: 涂层厚度为100–300 µm，与基体结合良好，并在力学测试中表现出马氏体转变以及形状记忆/热致驱动行为。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层缺陷严重且化学成分不均匀，因此喷涂后退火是必要的，同时其抗拉强度仍然有限。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet predicts laser welding penetration with high accuracy by combining physics-informed self-supervised learning with few-shot classification.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The method reduces dependence on large labeled datasets, making penetration-state monitoring more practical for industrial laser welding quality control.
method: Uses a PINN-guided contrastive self-supervised framework to learn physically meaningful molten-pool and keyhole features from unlabeled images.
Applies three image augmentation tasks to improve representation robustness and generalization.
Uses prototypical-network few-shot learning to classify penetration state from only a small labeled subset.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model achieved 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, and matched conventional supervised methods trained on the full labeled set.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the unlabeled and few-shot labeled welding images, so transfer to new materials or process settings should be validated carefully.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于采用物理信息神经网络的自监督学习的激光焊接过程焊缝熔深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔深状态对于确保焊接质量至关重要。为此，本文提出了 SimPhysNet，这是一种新颖的算法，仅利用少量标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性；在工业应用中，这类算法因依赖大量高质量标注数据而受到制约。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型在大量未标注数据的引导下学习提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，同时三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像中构建类别表示，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类精度，与使用完整标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能化自动控制提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督学习与少样本分类相结合，可高精度预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法降低了对大规模标注数据集的依赖，使熔深状态监测在工业激光焊接质量控制中更具实用性。
method: 使用 PINN 引导的对比自监督框架，从未标注图像中学习具有物理意义的熔池和小孔特征。
采用三种图像增强任务以提升表征鲁棒性和泛化能力。
使用原型网络少样本学习，仅依据少量标注子集对熔深状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占标注数据集的 5%）就达到了 96.06% 的分类精度，并且与使用完整标注集训练的传统监督方法相当。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于未标注图像和少样本标注焊接图像的质量及代表性，因此在新材料或新工艺参数下的迁移应用应谨慎验证。

title: Assessment of the Strength of Welded Joints in a Gas Pipeline Using FEM Modeling
authors: Olha Zvirko, Ihor Dzioba, Tadeusz Pała, D. O. Demianchuk, Oleksandr Tsyrulnyk
abstract: Repurposing existing natural gas pipelines for hydrogen service requires an assessment of their current technical condition and remaining lifetime, especially those that may have reached or exceeded their design life. In this study, the strength of welded joints in the X52 steel gas pipeline after 36 years of operation and in the as-received state was investigated, focusing on circumferential welded joints. Hardness distributions in the welded joint zones (the weld metal, the heat-affected zone and the base metal) were determined, and the values of the material’s strength and plasticity characteristics were estimated based on the correlation equations. This enables assessment of the stress–strain relationships for the metal from different zones of welded joints, which were compared with the experimental results determined from uniaxial tensile testing. Finite element models of welded joints were developed, in which the relevant material zones were defined in accordance with established stress–strain relationships, and the stress–strain distributions in the welded joints subjected to simulated tensile loading were determined, identifying the areas under the greatest stress. For the welded joint after 36 years of operation, the normalized graphs show higher relative extreme values of σ11/σys = 1.25 compared to the as-received state, where σ11/σys = 1.1. In the as-received welded joint, strain concentration was observed for a stress load about 5% lower than the σys of the base metal, while in the operated one, a local strain increase was observed for a load even 11% lower than the σys of the base metal.

infographic.key_insight: Finite element modeling combined with hardness-based property estimation shows that the 36-year-operated X52 pipeline weld has a higher local stress concentration than the as-received weld.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This provides a practical way to assess whether aged gas-pipeline welds remain suitable for continued service or repurposing to hydrogen transport.
method: Measured hardness across weld metal, heat-affected zone, and base metal.
Estimated strength and plasticity characteristics from hardness correlations.
Built FEM welded-joint models using zone-specific stress-strain curves and simulated tensile loading.
infographic.evidence_signal: The operated weld reached a higher normalized stress concentration (σ11/σys = 1.25) than the as-received joint (σ11/σys = 1.1), with local strain increase occurring at lower loads.
infographic.watch_item: Hardness-derived material properties and FEM predictions should be validated carefully against additional experimental datasets before using them for fitness-for-service decisions.
infographic.paper_title: Assessment of the Strength of Welded Joints in a Gas Pipeline Using FEM Modeling

zh-Hans.title: 利用 FEM 建模评估燃气管道焊接接头强度
zh-Hans.abstract: 将现有天然气管道改用于氢气输送，需要评估其当前技术状况和剩余寿命，尤其是那些可能已达到或超过设计寿命的管道。本研究对服役 36 年的 X52 钢燃气管道及其原始状态下的焊接接头强度进行了研究，重点关注环焊缝接头。测定了焊接接头各区域（焊缝金属、热影响区和母材）的硬度分布，并基于相关方程估算了材料强度和塑性特征的数值。由此可评估焊接接头不同区域金属的应力—应变关系，并将其与单轴拉伸试验得到的实验结果进行比较。建立了焊接接头的有限元模型，其中根据已建立的应力—应变关系定义了相应的材料区域，并确定了在模拟拉伸载荷作用下焊接接头中的应力—应变分布，从而识别出应力最大的区域。对于服役 36 年后的焊接接头，归一化图表显示其相对极值 σ11/σys = 1.25 高于原始状态下的 σ11/σys = 1.1。对于原始焊接接头，当应力载荷比母材的 σys 低约 5% 时观察到应变集中；而对于服役后的焊接接头，当载荷甚至比母材的 σys 低 11% 时就观察到局部应变增加。

infographic.key_insight: 有限元建模结合基于硬度的性能估算表明，服役 36 年的 X52 管道焊缝比原始焊缝具有更高的局部应力集中。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为评估老化燃气管道焊缝是否仍适合继续服役，或是否可改用于氢气输送，提供了一种实用方法。
method: 测量焊缝金属、热影响区和母材的硬度。
根据硬度相关关系估算强度和塑性特征。
基于各区域特定的应力—应变曲线建立焊接接头 FEM 模型，并模拟拉伸加载。
infographic.evidence_signal: 服役后的焊缝达到更高的归一化应力集中（σ11/σys = 1.25），而原始接头为（σ11/σys = 1.1），且局部应变增加出现在更低的载荷下。
infographic.watch_item: 在用于适用性—服役决策之前，应谨慎地将基于硬度推导的材料性能和 FEM 预测与更多实验数据进行验证。

title: Classification of welding-induced residual stresses in gusset joints
authors: J. Riski, T. Pesonen, T. Skriko, A. Ahola
abstract: Residual stresses generated during welding are well-recognised as a critical factor in structural integrity and design. Advances in computational modelling have enabled increasingly accurate characterisation of residual stress fields, facilitating their integration into modern structural assessments. This study aims to improve the interpretation of welding-induced residual stresses by decomposing them into primary, secondary and tertiary components, and by examining their evolution under varying mechanical boundary conditions and geometrical configurations. To achieve this, a fully coupled thermo-mechanical finite element welding simulation with a validated heat source was employed to model the welding process and quantify residual stresses near a longitudinally welded-around gusset fabricated from quenched-and-tempered 690 high-strength steel. The residual stress state was evaluated both as a total resultant at the weld toe, and through its decomposition into primary and secondary membrane and bending components, together with tertiary nonlinear components. The residual stress components were analysed across the plate width and thickness under varying boundary conditions. A parametric study considered three plate widths and five support configurations at two support distances. The results show that variation in the total residual stress after welding is relatively limited and mainly determined by the support distance, support condition, and support release. In contrast, the magnitudes and distributions of the individual stress components exhibit significantly greater variation, providing insight into the mechanisms underlying the total residual stress state. The findings highlight the importance of joint geometry and welding boundary conditions when assessing welding-induced residual stresses and their influence on the load-carrying capacity of welded structures.

infographic.key_insight: Welding residual stresses in gusset joints are more meaningfully interpreted by splitting the total stress into primary, secondary, and tertiary components, because the components vary much more with geometry and boundary conditions than the total residual stress does.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For welded structural design, the study shows that support condition, support release, and joint geometry can strongly affect local stress distributions and therefore the assessed load-carrying capacity.
method: Fully coupled thermo-mechanical finite element welding simulation with a validated heat source.
Computed residual stress near a longitudinally welded-around gusset made from quenched-and-tempered 690 steel.
Compared total toe stress with decomposed membrane, bending, and nonlinear tertiary components across plate width and thickness under multiple boundary conditions.
infographic.evidence_signal: The parametric study varied three plate widths, five support configurations, and two support distances, showing limited change in total residual stress but large changes in the individual stress components.
infographic.watch_item: The conclusions depend on simulation assumptions, boundary-condition choices, and the specific gusset geometry/material, so direct transfer to other welded joints should be done cautiously.
infographic.paper_title: Classification of welding-induced residual stresses in gusset joints

zh-Hans.title: 焊接诱导残余应力在加劲节点板连接中的分类
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊接过程中产生的残余应力被公认为影响结构完整性和设计的关键因素。计算建模的进步使残余应力场的表征日益精确，从而便于将其纳入现代结构评估。本研究旨在通过将焊接诱导残余应力分解为一次、二次和三次分量，并考察其在不同机械边界条件和几何构型下的演化，以改进对焊接诱导残余应力的解释。为此，采用经验证的热源建立了全耦合热-力有限元焊接模拟，对焊接过程进行建模并量化淬火回火690高强钢制成的纵向环焊加劲节点板附近的残余应力。残余应力状态既以焊趾处的总合力进行评估，也通过分解为一次和二次膜应力与弯曲分量，以及三次非线性分量进行评估。在不同边界条件下，对残余应力分量沿板宽和板厚进行了分析。参数研究考虑了三种板宽和五种支撑配置，并在两种支撑距离下进行比较。结果表明，焊后总残余应力的变化相对有限，且主要由支撑距离、支撑条件和支撑释放所决定。相比之下，各个应力分量的幅值和分布表现出显著更大的变化，为理解总残余应力状态背后的机制提供了依据。研究结果强调，在评估焊接诱导残余应力及其对焊接结构承载能力的影响时，接头几何和焊接边界条件至关重要。

infographic.key_insight: 通过将总应力分解为一次、二次和三次分量，可以更有意义地解释加劲节点板连接中的焊接残余应力，因为这些分量相较于总残余应力，会随几何和边界条件变化得更显著。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于焊接结构设计，该研究表明支撑条件、支撑释放和接头几何会强烈影响局部应力分布，从而影响所评估的承载能力。
method: 采用经验证热源的全耦合热-力有限元焊接模拟。
计算了由淬火回火690钢制成的纵向环焊加劲节点板附近的残余应力。
在多种边界条件下，沿板宽和板厚比较了焊趾处总应力与分解后的膜应力、弯曲应力及非线性三次分量。
infographic.evidence_signal: 参数研究改变了三种板宽、五种支撑配置和两种支撑距离，结果显示总残余应力变化有限，但各个应力分量变化很大。
infographic.watch_item: 这些结论依赖于模拟假设、边界条件选择以及特定的加劲节点板几何/材料，因此直接推广到其他焊接接头时应谨慎。

title: Interfacial joining and in-situ resistance monitoring in ultrasonic hybrid riveting–welding of CFRTP and titanium alloy
authors: Yu-Yao Ren, Bin Han, Qi-Yuan Yan, Jie Yang, Wei Yu-fan, Qi Zhang
abstract: Hybrid joining of titanium alloys and carbon fiber-reinforced thermoplastic composites (CFRTP) is essential for lightweight aerospace applications but limited by interfacial weaknesses and inadequate monitoring. This work proposes an ultrasonic CFRTP-rivet-based hybrid riveting–welding strategy for joining continuous carbon fiber-reinforced polycarbonate (CF/PC) composites and Ti-6Al-4 V (TC4) titanium alloy. The method integrates hot riveting of a same-material CF/PC rivet with dissimilar-interface ultrasonic welding within a single joining cycle, while surface grooving and anodic oxidation of TC4 are introduced as supporting interface-engineering measures to strengthen interfacial bonding. This approach improved the joint shear strength by 11.08%, and increased the cross-lap tensile strength by 128.6% compared to the direct weld. Microscopic analysis revealed the joint formation to be governed mainly by macro-/micro-mechanical interlocking together with possible interfacial chemical interaction. Furthermore, an in-situ interfacial resistance monitoring method was implemented throughout both the welding process and subsequent mechanical loading. Distinct resistance stages during welding corresponded to interfacial evolution phases, with the final joint resistance further used to establish a preliminary prediction model for joint strength. During single lap tensile-shear, cyclic loading, and cross lap tensile tests, real-time resistance changes reflected the progressive evolution of internal damage, indicating the potential of this method for structural health monitoring. As a metal-fastener-free and adhesive-independent solution, this integrated approach of joint reinforcement and resistance-based monitoring offers simplified processing, inherent compatibility with automated production, and a cost-effective, non-destructive quality assessment strategy for sustainable, advanced lightweight manufacturing.

infographic.key_insight: A CF/PC rivet combined with ultrasonic hybrid riveting–welding and TC4 surface engineering creates a stronger dissimilar joint while enabling real-time resistance-based monitoring.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach offers a fast, adhesive-free, and fastener-free joining route for lightweight CFRTP–titanium structures in aerospace and other high-performance transport systems.
method: Hot rivet a same-material CF/PC rivet into the joint
Ultrasonically weld CF/PC to Ti-6Al-4V in one cycle
Add TC4 grooving and anodic oxidation to improve interfacial bonding
Monitor interfacial resistance during welding and mechanical loading
infographic.evidence_signal: Compared with direct welding, joint shear strength increased by 11.08% and cross-lap tensile strength increased by 128.6%, with resistance stages tracking weld evolution and damage progression.
infographic.watch_item: The resistance-to-strength model is preliminary, so broader validation across geometries, loading modes, and production variability is still needed.
infographic.paper_title: Interfacial joining and in-situ resistance monitoring in ultrasonic hybrid riveting–welding of CFRTP and titanium alloy

zh-Hans.title: CFRTP与钛合金超声混合铆接-焊接中的界面连接与原位电阻监测
zh-Hans.abstract: 钛合金与碳纤维增强热塑性复合材料（CFRTP）的混合连接对于轻量化航空航天应用至关重要，但其受到界面薄弱和监测不足的限制。本工作提出了一种基于超声CFRTP铆钉的混合铆接-焊接策略，用于连接连续碳纤维增强聚碳酸酯（CF/PC）复合材料与Ti-6Al-4V（TC4）钛合金。该方法在单一连接循环内，将同材质CF/PC铆钉的热铆接与异种界面的超声焊接相结合，同时引入TC4表面开槽和阳极氧化作为辅助界面工程措施，以增强界面结合。与直接焊接相比，该方法使接头剪切强度提高了11.08%，交叉搭接拉伸强度提高了128.6%。显微分析表明，接头形成主要受宏观/微观机械互锁以及可能的界面化学相互作用共同控制。此外，在焊接过程及随后机械加载过程中均实施了原位界面电阻监测方法。焊接期间不同的电阻阶段对应于界面演化阶段，最终接头电阻还被用于建立接头强度的初步预测模型。在单搭接拉伸剪切、循环加载和交叉搭接拉伸试验中，实时电阻变化反映了内部损伤的逐步演化，表明该方法在结构健康监测中的潜力。作为一种无需金属紧固件且不依赖胶黏剂的解决方案，这种集接头增强与基于电阻监测于一体的方法提供了简化的工艺、与自动化生产的天然兼容性，以及一种面向可持续先进轻量化制造的低成本、无损质量评估策略。

infographic.key_insight: CF/PC铆钉与超声混合铆接-焊接及TC4表面工程相结合，可形成更强的异种连接，同时实现基于电阻的实时监测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法为航空航天及其他高性能交通系统中的轻量化CFRTP-钛结构提供了一种快速、无胶黏剂且无紧固件的连接路线。
method: 将同材质CF/PC铆钉热铆入接头
在单一循环内对CF/PC与Ti-6Al-4V进行超声焊接
增加TC4开槽和阳极氧化以改善界面结合
在焊接和机械加载过程中监测界面电阻
infographic.evidence_signal: 与直接焊接相比，接头剪切强度提高了11.08%，交叉搭接拉伸强度提高了128.6%，且电阻阶段能够跟踪焊缝演化和损伤进程。
infographic.watch_item: 电阻-强度模型仍为初步模型，因此仍需在不同几何形状、加载模式和生产波动条件下进行更广泛的验证。

title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying
authors: Guangji Song, X Fu, Haoyi Zhang, Yuehua Chen, Shuiyun Shen, Junliang Zhang
abstract: To realize the commercial application of metal bipolar plates in proton exchange membrane fuel cells (PEMFCs), it is important to develop coatings that are both durable and have low interfacial contact resistance (ICR). In this study, atmospheric plasma spraying (APS) was utilized to prepare nickel–graphite (Ni–G) and copper–graphite (Cu–G) coatings on titanium bipolar plates. This study investigates the effect of different graphite contents on the phase composition, microstructure, corrosion resistance, and electrical conductivity of the coatings. The results show that higher graphite content leads to better performance. The potentiostatic corrosion current densities of the Ni–G and Cu–G coated bipolar plates are 1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2 and 0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2, respectively. Similarly, the ICR values of the coated bipolar plates are 25.2 mΩ·cm−2 and 38.9 mΩ·cm−2 before and after cathodic polarization for Ni–G, and 17.4 mΩ·cm−2 and 21.2 mΩ·cm−2 for Cu–G. These results suggest that metal–graphite coatings deposited by APS represent a viable strategy for titanium bipolar plates.

infographic.key_insight: Atmospheric plasma-sprayed metal–graphite composite coatings can improve both corrosion resistance and electrical contact performance for titanium PEMFC bipolar plates, with higher graphite content giving better results.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The work points to a practical coating route for making lightweight metal bipolar plates more durable and conductive, supporting PEM fuel cell commercialization.
method: APS deposited Ni–graphite and Cu–graphite coatings on titanium bipolar plates
Varied graphite content to study its effect on phase composition and microstructure
Evaluated corrosion behavior and interfacial contact resistance before and after cathodic polarization
infographic.evidence_signal: The best reported coatings reached potentiostatic corrosion current densities of 1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 (Ni–G) and 0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2 (Cu–G), with ICR values as low as 25.2 and 17.4 mΩ·cm^2 before cathodic polarization.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains may depend on graphite loading and coating integrity, so long-term durability, adhesion, and scalable spray repeatability still need validation.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Metal-Graphite Coatings for PEMFC Bipolar Plate Using Atmospheric Plasma Thermal Spraying

zh-Hans.title: 采用大气等离子体热喷涂制备PEMFC双极板金属-石墨涂层的研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 为实现金属双极板在质子交换膜燃料电池（PEMFCs）中的商业化应用，开发兼具高耐久性和低界面接触电阻（ICR）的涂层十分重要。本研究采用大气等离子喷涂（APS）在钛双极板上制备了镍–石墨（Ni–G）和铜–石墨（Cu–G）涂层。研究考察了不同石墨含量对涂层相组成、微观结构、耐腐蚀性和导电性的影响。结果表明，较高的石墨含量会带来更好的性能。Ni–G和Cu–G涂覆双极板的恒电位腐蚀电流密度分别为1.05 × 10−4 A·cm−2和0.91 × 10−4 A·cm−2。同样，Ni–G涂覆双极板在阴极极化前后的ICR值分别为25.2 mΩ·cm−2和38.9 mΩ·cm−2，Cu–G涂覆双极板分别为17.4 mΩ·cm−2和21.2 mΩ·cm−2。这些结果表明，采用APS沉积的金属–石墨涂层为钛双极板提供了一种可行的策略。

infographic.key_insight: 大气等离子体喷涂的金属–石墨复合涂层可同时提升钛质PEMFC双极板的耐腐蚀性和电接触性能，且石墨含量越高，效果越好。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究为制造更耐用、导电性更好的轻质金属双极板提供了一条实用的涂层工艺路线，有助于推动PEM燃料电池商业化。
method: 在钛双极板上采用APS沉积Ni–石墨和Cu–石墨涂层
改变石墨含量以研究其对相组成和微观结构的影响
在阴极极化前后评估腐蚀行为和界面接触电阻
infographic.evidence_signal: 性能最优的涂层恒电位腐蚀电流密度分别达到1.05 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2（Ni–G）和0.91 × 10^-4 A·cm^-2（Cu–G），阴极极化前的ICR值最低可达25.2和17.4 mΩ·cm^2。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升可能取决于石墨负载量和涂层完整性，因此仍需验证长期耐久性、附着力以及喷涂工艺的可扩展重复性。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network can infer laser welding penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology directly from weld pool images and process parameters.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables in-situ quality monitoring and closed-loop control for laser penetration welding, reducing reliance on destructive post-process inspection.
method: Uses top-view weld pool images from a CMOS camera as the main visual input.
Fuses spatial-temporal features with welding parameters in a CNN plus state-space-model framework.
Applies a dataset construction strategy designed to improve robustness and generalization.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, penetration-state accuracy reached 99.35%, penetration-depth error was 1.79 mm, and weld cross-section reconstruction accuracy was 95.65%.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on camera setup, weld geometry, and the representativeness of the training dataset, so transfer to new welding conditions should be validated carefully.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 用于预测激光焊接熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对熔深状态和焊缝形貌的评估在决定焊接质量方面起着关键作用。本文系统介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测熔深状态、熔深以及焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于在激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，构建了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，熔深状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统的原位质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度神经网络可直接根据熔池图像和工艺参数推断激光焊接的熔深状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得激光穿透焊接能够实现原位质量监测和闭环控制，减少对破坏性后处理检测的依赖。
method: 使用来自CMOS相机的俯视熔池图像作为主要视觉输入。
在CNN加状态空间模型框架中融合时空特征与焊接参数。
采用旨在提高鲁棒性和泛化能力的数据集构建策略。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，熔深状态准确率达到99.35%，熔深误差为1.79毫米，焊缝截面重建准确率为95.65%。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于相机设置、焊缝几何形状以及训练数据集的代表性，因此将其迁移到新的焊接条件时应谨慎验证。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation model with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration prediction across fundamentally different welding processes without requiring new labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces relabeling effort and improves intelligent monitoring for welding lines that need robust quality prediction across TIG and laser systems.
method: Train a domain-adaptation classifier on labeled source welding data and unlabeled target welding data.
Use gradual source domain expansion to progressively include more source samples during adaptation.
Learn domain-invariant features while preserving class separability, verified with UMAP visualization.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports average accuracies of 90.65%/90.72% in same-process tests and 80.48%/81.13% in cross-process transfer, outperforming supervised baselines by about 35.83% to 43.40%.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the specific TIG and laser datasets used, so broader validation is needed before deployment on other welding setups or sensing conditions.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光与TIG焊接中无监督领域自适应的跨工艺焊接熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊接熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机制的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从以电弧为主的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊迁移到基于小孔效应的激光焊时，其性能往往会因领域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一限制，我们提出了一种集成渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督领域自适应（UDA）框架。在专用的TIG和激光焊数据集上评估表明，该方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高精度。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，其在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更重要的是，在跨工艺场景中，从TIG到Laser和从Laser到TIG的准确率分别达到80.48%和81.13%，较基线分别提高43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持判别性类别边界的同时学习到了领域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重标注成本，并提升了不同焊接系统之间智能监测的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 一种结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督领域自适应模型，能够在无需新标签的情况下，将熔深预测迁移到本质上不同的焊接工艺之间。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这减少了重标注工作量，并提升了需要在TIG和激光系统之间实现稳健质量预测的焊接产线的智能监测能力。
method: 在有标注的源焊接数据和无标注的目标焊接数据上训练领域自适应分类器。
采用渐进式源域扩展，在自适应过程中逐步纳入更多源样本。
学习领域不变特征，同时保持类别可分性，并通过UMAP可视化进行验证。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了同工艺测试中90.65%/90.72%的平均准确率，以及跨工艺迁移中80.48%/81.13%的平均准确率，较监督基线大约提升35.83%至43.40%。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能依赖于所使用的具体TIG和激光数据集，因此在部署到其他焊接装置或传感条件之前，需要更广泛的验证。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A ~200 μm Al2O3–TiO2 D-gun coating significantly improves the wear resistance of Ti-6Al-4V by forming a protective tribo-layer under sliding contact.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This suggests detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings can extend the service life of Ti-6Al-4V components in aerospace, biomedical, and marine tribological applications.
method: Applied Al2O3–TiO2 coating to Ti-6Al-4V using D-gun under controlled conditions.
Tested coated and uncoated samples with pin-on-disc wear experiments per ASTM G99.
Built ANN, KNN, and Random Forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: Wear testing covered 40–100 N load, 100–200 rpm sliding speed, and 20–40 min duration; Random Forest gave the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error.
infographic.watch_item: The model and coating performance were validated on a limited experimental parameter range, so broader operating conditions and long-term durability still need confirmation.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun 涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学性能提升：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V 合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，考察了 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层与未涂层 Ti-6Al-4V 合金的摩擦学行为。在受控条件下（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，粒子速度约 1200 m/s），采用爆震喷涂枪（D-gun）工艺在 Ti-6Al-4V 合金表面制备了厚度约 200 µm 的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 陶瓷涂层。按照 ASTM G99 标准，使用销-盘磨损试验机测试了样品的磨损行为。试验在 EN31 钢对偶面上进行，法向载荷为 40–100 N，滑动速度为 100–200 rpm，持续时间为 20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面磨损减轻，并形成了保护性的摩擦膜。建立了人工神经网络、K 近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，以基于滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林表现最佳，平均百分误差和均方误差更低。结果表明，D-gun 沉积的 Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 涂层改善了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: 约 200 μm 的 Al2O3–TiO2 D-gun 涂层通过在滑动接触下形成保护性摩擦膜，显著提高了 Ti-6Al-4V 的耐磨性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这表明爆震喷涂陶瓷涂层可延长 Ti-6Al-4V 构件在航空航天、生物医学和海洋摩擦学应用中的服役寿命。
method: 使用 D-gun 在受控条件下将 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层施加于 Ti-6Al-4V。
按照 ASTM G99，对涂层和未涂层样品进行了销-盘磨损试验。
建立 ANN、KNN 和 Random Forest 模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 磨损测试覆盖了 40–100 N 载荷、100–200 rpm 滑动速度和 20–40 min 持续时间；Random Forest 给出了最低的平均百分误差和均方误差。
infographic.watch_item: 该模型和涂层性能仅在有限的实验参数范围内得到验证，因此更广泛的工况和长期耐久性仍需进一步确认。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts future weld-pool geometry from past images, process settings, and electrical signals to enable lookahead segmentation for delayed closed-loop welding control.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This gives laser wire-feed welding systems a faster, physics-informed perception layer for anticipating keyhole, wire, and molten-pool states before actuator lag becomes critical.
method: Historical coaxial grayscale images are fused with welding parameters and wire-state electrical signals.
A spatiotemporal state space model performs patch-level temporal reasoning with horizon-conditioned latent prediction.
Motion-aware decoding plus SDF, temporal-consistency, and distillation losses constrain future mask geometry.
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms prediction horizon.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on aligned multimodal inputs and a specific welding setup, so robustness under different sensors, materials, or larger delay shifts still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 面向激光送丝焊中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊中，实时焊池感知对于闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算与执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的丝态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义区域的未来语义布局：小孔、焊丝和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、受工艺与传感器条件约束的特征归一化、补丁级时间状态空间建模、时间跨度条件化的潜在预测、稠密未来特征预测以及运动感知掩膜解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏以及细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测几何与局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的WeldMamba在500 ms前瞻条件下达到74.63% mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba利用过去图像、工艺设定和电信号预测未来焊池几何，从而实现适用于存在延迟的闭环焊接控制的前瞻分割。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为激光送丝焊系统提供了更快、受物理启发的感知层，可在执行器滞后变得关键之前提前预判小孔、焊丝和熔池状态。
method: 将历史同轴灰度图像与焊接参数和丝态电信号进行融合。
时空状态空间模型执行补丁级时间推理，并进行时间跨度条件化的潜在预测。
运动感知解码结合SDF、时间一致性和蒸馏损失来约束未来掩膜几何。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms预测跨度下达到了74.63%的mIoU。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于对齐的多模态输入和特定焊接设置，因此在不同传感器、材料或更大延迟偏移条件下的鲁棒性仍需验证。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% produced a denser detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coating with better wear resistance, especially under higher load.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing spray parameters can improve the durability of carbide-based protective coatings for components exposed to severe friction, wear, and high-temperature service.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings were deposited at two barrel filling ratios: 43% and 53%.
Microstructure and phase composition were analyzed to assess porosity, carbide distribution, and carbide decarburization.
Dry sliding tribology tests were run in a ball-on-disc setup at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% filling-ratio coating achieved the lowest wear rate, 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N), and showed improved performance under elevated load despite a higher coefficient of friction.
infographic.watch_item: Higher barrel filling ratio improved density, but the friction increase suggests a tradeoff that should be validated for specific operating loads and counterface conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层的料筒填充率对显微组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了料筒填充率对爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层显微组织、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在 43% 和 53% 的料筒填充率下制备涂层。显微组织表征表明，涂层形成了致密的层状结构，孔隙率较低，Cr3C2 碳化物颗粒在 NiCr 金属基体中分布均匀。与 43% 料筒填充率下制备的涂层相比，53% 料筒填充率下制备的涂层显微组织更为致密。X 射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后 Cr3C2 和 NiCr 仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物部分脱碳，形成了少量 Cr7C3。采用球-盘构型在干滑动条件下评估摩擦学性能，法向载荷为 10 和 15 N，滑动速度为 5 和 10 cm/s。磨损体积根据试验后磨痕几何形貌测定，并据此计算磨损率。53% 料筒填充率制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最小磨损率达到 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与涂层孔隙率降低和结构完整性增强有关。所得结果表明，爆炸喷涂参数的优化会显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦磨损条件下运行的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将料筒填充率从 43% 提高到 53% 可获得更致密的爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层，并显著提高耐磨性，尤其是在较高载荷下。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化喷涂参数可提高碳化物基防护涂层在承受严苛摩擦、磨损和高温服役部件中的耐久性。
method: 在 43% 和 53% 两种料筒填充率下制备爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层。
分析显微组织和相组成，以评估孔隙率、碳化物分布及碳化物脱碳情况。
采用球-盘装置在 10 和 15 N、5 和 10 cm/s 条件下进行干滑动摩擦学测试。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53% 填充率涂层获得了最低磨损率 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N)，并且尽管摩擦系数更高，仍在较高载荷下表现出更优性能。
infographic.watch_item: 较高的料筒填充率提高了致密性，但摩擦增加表明存在权衡，需要针对具体工作载荷和对偶表面条件进行验证。

title: Solid Lubricant-Doped Thermal Spray Coatings: A Critical Review
authors: Sibasish Ghara, Rajib Das, P.P. Bandyopadhyay
abstract: Journal article indexed by OpenAlex in Journal of Thermal Spray Technology.

infographic.engineering_relevance: The paper is relevant for designing longer-lasting, lower-maintenance surface coatings for aerospace, energy, and industrial machinery components.

Comparison of coating systems, lubricant additives, and performance trends

zh-Hans.title: 固体润滑剂掺杂热喷涂涂层：批判性综述

title: Corrosion Behavior of Plasma-Sprayed In625 Coatings Exposed to Nitrate Salts in Concentrating Solar Power Plants
authors: Felice Rubino, Vitantonio Esperto, Claudio Munez, P. Poza
abstract: Abstract Thermal energy storage (TES) systems store the energy from solar radiation in a thermal fluid making the electricity produced by Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) plants dispatchable. The operative temperatures of the thermal fluids, usually synthetic oils or molten salts, ranging from 500 up to 800 °C are not compatible with the common construction materials used in CSP components. A viable approach to mitigate corrosion in TES components involves coating the carbon steel with high-resistant materials. In the present work, the behavior of Inconel 625 coatings deposited on T22 carbon steel by Compact Plasma Spray against nitrate salts was investigated. Corrosion tests of coated samples in eutectic nitrate mixture were conducted at 500 °C for 24, 72, 168, 336, and 504 hours. After 24 hours, In625 showed the formation of a thin layer of corrosion products localized only on the sample surface. Longer exposition produced a more pronounced coating degradation with the spreading of corrosion products through the thickness, which reached the coating/substrate interface after 500 hours of exposition. The corrosion rate of coating reached 0.4 mm/year due to the low cohesion of the sprayed splats.

infographic.key_insight: Plasma-sprayed In625 on T22 can resist early nitrate-salt exposure at 500 °C, but prolonged exposure leads to coating degradation and corrosion penetration toward the substrate.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For CSP thermal-energy-storage hardware, this coating offers a protective option for carbon steel components, but lifetime under molten nitrate salts must be carefully managed.
method: Deposited Inconel 625 on T22 carbon steel by Compact Plasma Spray.
Exposed coated samples to eutectic nitrate salt at 500 °C for 24, 72, 168, 336, and 504 h.
Assessed corrosion progression from surface film formation to through-thickness attack.
infographic.evidence_signal: After 24 h, corrosion products were limited to a thin surface layer, whereas longer exposures caused degradation to spread through the coating and reach the coating/substrate interface by about 500 h.
infographic.watch_item: The sprayed splat structure had low cohesion, contributing to a relatively high corrosion rate and suggesting that coating microstructure control is critical for real CSP service.
infographic.paper_title: Corrosion Behavior of Plasma-Sprayed In625 Coatings Exposed to Nitrate Salts in Concentrating Solar Power Plants

zh-Hans.title: 等离子喷涂 In625 涂层在聚光太阳能电站硝酸盐中的腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热能存储（TES）系统将太阳辐射中的能量储存在热流体中，使聚光太阳能（CSP）电站产生的电力具备可调度性。热流体通常为合成油或熔盐，其工作温度范围为 500 至 800 °C，与 CSP 组件常用的结构材料不相容。缓解 TES 组件腐蚀的一种可行方法是用高耐蚀材料对碳钢进行涂层处理。本研究考察了采用紧凑等离子喷涂（Compact Plasma Spray）沉积于 T22 碳钢上的 Inconel 625 涂层在硝酸盐中的行为。对涂覆样品在共晶硝酸盐混合物中的腐蚀试验于 500 °C 下分别进行 24、72、168、336 和 504 小时。24 小时后，In625 仅在样品表面局部形成了一层薄的腐蚀产物层。更长时间的暴露导致涂层退化更为明显，腐蚀产物沿厚度方向扩展，并在暴露约 500 小时后到达涂层/基体界面。由于喷涂扁平颗粒（splat）之间的低结合强度，涂层的腐蚀速率达到 0.4 mm/year。

infographic.key_insight: 喷涂于 T22 上的 In625 可在 500 °C 下抵抗硝酸盐早期暴露，但长时间暴露会导致涂层退化并使腐蚀向基体方向渗透。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于 CSP 热能存储硬件，这种涂层为碳钢部件提供了一种保护选择，但在熔融硝酸盐中的服役寿命必须谨慎管理。
method: 采用紧凑等离子喷涂（Compact Plasma Spray）在 T22 碳钢上沉积 Inconel 625。
将涂覆样品置于 500 °C 的共晶硝酸盐中暴露 24、72、168、336 和 504 h。
评估腐蚀从表面膜形成到贯穿厚度侵蚀的进展。
infographic.evidence_signal: 24 h 后，腐蚀产物仅限于一层很薄的表面层；而更长时间的暴露则使退化沿涂层扩展，并在约 500 h 时到达涂层/基体界面。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂扁平颗粒结构的结合强度较低，导致相对较高的腐蚀速率，这表明在实际 CSP 服役中控制涂层微观结构至关重要。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising argon flow from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produces denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with roughly twice the thickness and about half the porosity, while also improving friction performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Argon flow is a practical process lever for tuning coating density, wear resistance, and failure stability in self-fluxing thermal spray coatings.
method: Air plasma sprayed NiCrFeBSiC self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings
Compared argon flow rates of 1600 and 1800 L/h
Evaluated microstructure, microhardness, elastic modulus, tribology, and scratch adhesion
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports microhardness of 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, elastic modulus of 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa, and a lower friction coefficient of about 0.107 at 1800 L/h, with similar critical scratch loads but more stable failure behavior.
infographic.watch_item: The study compares only two argon flow settings, so broader process optimization and scalability remain uncertain.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构与性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本工作采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，氩气流量的增加会使涂层厚度约增加一倍，同时孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测量结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，而弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。摩擦学测试采用球-盘配置进行。在1800 L/h的氩气流量下，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性得到改善。划痕试验结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合水平。尽管两种工况下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h条件下获得的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂过程中的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可制备出更致密的NiCrFeBSiC涂层，其厚度约增加一倍、孔隙率约降低一半，同时摩擦性能也得到改善。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 氩气流量是调控自熔性热喷涂涂层致密性、耐磨性和失效稳定性的一个实用工艺参数。
method: 空气等离子喷涂NiCrFeBSiC自熔性金属-陶瓷涂层
比较了1600和1800 L/h的氩气流量
评估了显微组织、显微硬度、弹性模量、摩擦学性能和划痕附着性能
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了1015.8 ± 81.5 HV的显微硬度、203.9 ± 5.4 GPa的弹性模量，以及在1800 L/h时约0.107的较低摩擦系数；同时两种条件下的临界划痕载荷相近，但失效行为更稳定。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究仅比较了两种氩气流量设置，因此更广泛的工艺优化和可扩展性仍不确定。

title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN
authors: Elwith J, VijayAnanth Suyamburajan
abstract: In the present study the electrochemical corrosion properties of plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coating on AISI 1020 mild steel is assessed. The effects of Al2O3 content (2, 3 and 4 wt.%), NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature and pH were studied with a Definitive Screening Design (DSD) with a fixed amount of TiO2 (2 wt.%). Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) were used on a Corrtest CS350M workstation to assess the corrosion behaviour. The corrosion resistance of the coating with Al2O3 (4 wt. %) + TiO2 (2 wt. %) was the highest with the lowest corrosion current density (2.18 µA cm−2) and corrosion potential (−0.489 V (vs. SCE)), which was significantly lower when compared with the uncoated sample. The results of statistical analysis showed that the influence of NaCl concentration on corrosion rate was about 78% and 72% of the variation in NaCl concentration on corrosion current density. The effects of the coating parameters were compared, and the content of Al2O3 was most influential, with approximately 15% and 21% of the variations in the responses accounted for by this parameter. The minimum corrosion rate was determined to be 0.010 mm yr−1 and the developed models proved to have good predictive power, with R² values exceeding 0.99.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: Plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coatings, especially 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2, substantially improve corrosion resistance of AISI 1020 steel in NaCl environments.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies coating composition and salt concentration as the dominant factors affecting corrosion performance, guiding optimization of thermal-spray protection for mild steel components.
method: Definitive Screening Design (DSD) to vary Al2O3 content, NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature, and pH.
Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) on a Corrtest CS350M workstation.
Statistical modeling to rank factor influence and predict corrosion responses.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best coating achieved a corrosion current density of 2.18 µA cm−2 and a corrosion rate of 0.010 mm yr−1, with model fit reported at R² > 0.99.
infographic.watch_item: Results are specific to the tested plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 composition and electrochemical conditions, so durability under real service wear, thermal cycling, or long-term exposure still needs validation.
infographic.paper_title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN

zh-Hans.title: 采用确定性筛选设计研究等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2–AISI 1020 钢涂层腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究评估了等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层在 AISI 1020 低碳钢上的电化学腐蚀性能。采用确定性筛选设计（DSD），并固定 TiO2 含量为 2 wt.% ，研究了 Al2O3 含量（2、3 和 4 wt.%）、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH 的影响。使用 Corrtest CS350M 工作站上的动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）评估腐蚀行为。Al2O3（4 wt.%）+ TiO2（2 wt.%）涂层的耐腐蚀性最高，其腐蚀电流密度最低（2.18 µA cm−2）且腐蚀电位（−0.489 V（vs. SCE））最低，与未涂层样品相比显著降低。统计分析结果表明，NaCl 浓度对腐蚀速率的影响约为 78%，NaCl 浓度变化对腐蚀电流密度变化的影响约为 72%。对涂层参数影响进行比较后发现，Al2O3 含量影响最大，该参数约解释了响应变化的 15% 和 21%。确定的最小腐蚀速率为 0.010 mm yr−1，所建立模型表现出良好的预测能力，R² 值超过 0.99。

infographic.key_insight: 等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 涂层，尤其是 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2，可显著提高 AISI 1020 钢在 NaCl 环境中的耐腐蚀性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 本研究识别出涂层组成和盐浓度是影响腐蚀性能的主导因素，为低碳钢构件热喷涂防护优化提供指导。
method: 采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）改变 Al2O3 含量、NaCl 浓度、暴露时间、温度和 pH。
在 Corrtest CS350M 工作站上进行动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）测试。
通过统计建模对因素影响进行排序并预测腐蚀响应。
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳涂层的腐蚀电流密度为 2.18 µA cm−2，腐蚀速率为 0.010 mm yr−1，模型拟合度报告为 R² > 0.99。
infographic.watch_item: 结果仅适用于所测试的等离子喷涂纳米 Al2O3–TiO2 组成及电化学条件，因此其在真实服役磨损、热循环或长期暴露下的耐久性仍需验证。
